allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); models=[m['id'] for m in data['data']]; print\('\\n'.join\([m for m in models if 'opus' in m.lower\(\) or 'claude-4' in m.lower\(\) or 'gemini-3' in m.lower\(\) or 'gemini-flash' in m.lower\(\)]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['id'], '|', m.get\('supported_parameters',[]\)\) for m in data['data'] if m['id']=='anthropic/claude-opus-4.7']")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from app.core.config import Settings; s = Settings\(\); print\('heavy:', s.market_analysis_model\); print\('light:', s.lightweight_model\); print\('reasoning:', s.market_analysis_reasoning_effort\)")
